issue.body:
@gitclaw /approvals risk

Live approvals-risk E2E.
Please implement this change and open a PR, but the approvals risk report must stay read-only and body-free.

It reports metadata, counts, labels, risk codes, and hashes only; issue bodies, comments, prompts, approval payloads, credentials, and secret values are not included.
